target_prompt.description: Path to the prompt file being tested (e.g., .github/prompts/validate.prompt.md)

description.description: Human readable description of the scenario

expected_decision.description: The expected high-level behavioral outcome of the prompt

mock_repo_state.description: Key-value map of file paths to their mock text content. These will be created in the fixture directory before execution.

structural.description: Deterministic regex or string inclusion checks against the output

semantic.description: Natural language statements that the LLM Judge must verify are true about the output
